title: AIEcommerce - Autonomous PC Assembly & Marketplace Pipeline
description: Architected a distributed system using LangGraph agents to automate the end-to-end process of scraping hardware components, assembling optimized PC builds, and publishing enriched listings to MercadoLibre.
challenge: Managing a high-volume hardware catalog required manual intervention for compatibility checks, pricing updates, and SEO-optimized descriptions, leading to significant operational bottlenecks.
The data source (Tecnomega) provided raw PDF and web data that lacked the structured attributes necessary for high-conversion listings on platforms like MercadoLibre.
Synchronizing stock and volatile pricing across a decoupled architecture (Django backend + MedusaJS storefront) while maintaining a multi-agent assembly logic was a complex orchestration hurdle.

narrative: I designed a multi-agent orchestration layer using LangGraph that treats PC assembly as a stateful graph. Agents act as specialized roles: an Inventory Architect audits stock, a Bundle Creator validates component compatibility (CPU sockets, RAM types, Power requirements), and a Creative Director generates marketing assets.

The system utilizes a 'Sentinel' pattern for health monitoring and a centralized product 'Master' record in Django that acts as the single source of truth for the MedusaJS store and external marketplace synchronizers.

features.title: Autonomous PC Builder Agent
features.description: LangGraph-powered logic that selects compatible parts from the database to create high-margin computer 'Towers' based on real-time stock.

features.title: AI Content Enrichment
features.description: Automated pipeline that extracts technical specs from raw text/PDFs and uses LLMs to generate SEO-optimized titles and descriptions for MercadoLibre.

features.title: Cross-Platform Sync Engine
features.description: Robust synchronization service that manages inventory state between the internal Django DB, the MedusaJS storefront, and MercadoLibre API.

features.title: Intelligent Image Upscaling
features.description: Integrated processing pipeline that fetches low-res supplier images and enhances them for high-quality marketplace display.

implementation.description: The architecture follows a modular service-oriented pattern. The 'Agents' service communicates with the 'Core' Django API via structured Pydantic schemas. LangGraph manages the state of assembly tasks, ensuring that if a component goes out of stock during the process, the graph self-heals by selecting an alternative.

results.narrative: The transformation from manual entry to an agentic pipeline allowed for the rapid expansion of the product catalog. The system now autonomously maintains thousands of listings, ensuring that every PC 'Tower' offered is technically compatible, profitably priced, and marketed with AI-generated precision.

parentClass.name: Autonomous Agent Orchestration Engine
parentClass.description: A stateful, graph-driven execution runtime that coordinates specialized AI agents through defined workflows, handles failures gracefully, and maintains a single source of truth for downstream consumers.

inheritedTraits.label: Stateful Graph Execution
inheritedTraits.evidence: LangGraph manages assembly tasks as a directed graph where each node is a specialized agent with defined state transitions.

inheritedTraits.label: Self-Healing Inventory
inheritedTraits.evidence: When a component goes out of stock mid-assembly, the graph automatically selects an alternative without human intervention.

inheritedTraits.label: LLM Content Generation
inheritedTraits.evidence: A Creative Director agent generates SEO-optimized titles and descriptions from raw technical specs using OpenAI and Gemini APIs.

overrides.label: Autonomous PC Assembly Logic
overrides.description: Specialized bundle creation that validates hardware compatibility — CPU sockets, RAM types, power requirements — before producing sellable computer builds.

overrides.label: Marketplace-Specific Enrichment
overrides.description: Tailored content pipeline that transforms raw supplier data into MercadoLibre-optimized listings with upscaled images, structured attributes, and localized descriptions.

inheritanceStory.resultingIdentity: A specialized e-commerce agent pipeline that autonomously assembles, validates, enriches, and publishes hardware products at scale.

title: Narbox - Package Consolidation & Global Logistics
description: Engineered a full-stack logistics platform for managing international package forwarding, featuring a robust Django GraphQL API and a high-performance Next.js 15 administrative dashboard.
challenge: The legacy system struggled to handle the complex state transitions required for package consolidation, where multiple individual shipments from different vendors are merged into a single international dispatch.

The administrative team required a highly responsive interface to manage thousands of client packages, track real-time status changes, and generate automated customs documentation without performance lag.

Providing a seamless multi-language experience (English/Spanish) while maintaining type safety and data integrity across a decoupled backend and frontend architecture was critical for global operations.

narrative: I architected a decoupled system using Django and Graphene-Django to provide a flexible, strongly-typed GraphQL API. This allowed the frontend to request exactly the data needed for complex dashboards, reducing payload sizes by 60%.

The frontend was built with Next.js 15 and the App Router, utilizing Apollo Client for state management and caching. I implemented a modular UI component library using Tailwind CSS and Radix UI to ensure consistency across the Client and Admin portals.

features.title: Complex Consolidation Logic
features.description: Backend engine that manages the lifecycle of packages from warehouse arrival to final consolidation, ensuring strict validation of weights and dimensions.

features.title: Real-time Admin Dashboard
features.description: A high-performance interface with advanced filtering and batch processing capabilities for managing client inventory and shipments.

features.title: Enterprise i18n Strategy
features.description: Localized experience using next-intl, supporting dynamic content translation and region-specific formatting for logistics data.

features.title: Automated Notification Engine
features.description: Integrated email system triggered by state changes in the package lifecycle, keeping clients informed of their shipment status automatically.

implementation.description: The system follows a 'Single Source of Truth' pattern where the Django ORM defines the business logic and constraints, which are then exposed via GraphQL. The React frontend consumes these schemas with high-level hooks for data fetching and optimistic UI updates.

results.narrative: The migration to a GraphQL-based architecture and a modern React frontend transformed the platform's scalability. Administrative staff reported a significant reduction in manual entry errors, while the multi-language support allowed Narbox to successfully expand its operations into new international markets.

parentClass.name: Distributed Logistics Runtime
parentClass.description: A decoupled backend-frontend architecture with strongly-typed data contracts, lifecycle state management, and built-in internationalization for multi-region operations.

inheritedTraits.label: State Machine Lifecycle
inheritedTraits.evidence: Packages move through strictly validated states — received, warehoused, consolidated, dispatched — with automated notifications at each transition.

inheritedTraits.label: GraphQL Typed Contracts
inheritedTraits.evidence: Graphene-Django exposes a strongly-typed API that lets the frontend request exactly the data needed, reducing payload sizes by 60%.

inheritedTraits.label: i18n-First Architecture
inheritedTraits.evidence: Enterprise internationalization using next-intl supports dynamic content translation and region-specific formatting across client and admin portals.

overrides.label: Consolidation State Transitions
overrides.description: Specialized logic for merging multiple individual shipments from different vendors into a single international dispatch with strict weight and dimension validation.

overrides.label: Customs Document Automation
overrides.description: Automated generation of customs documentation triggered by consolidation state changes, eliminating manual paperwork for international shipments.

inheritanceStory.resultingIdentity: A specialized forwarding platform that orchestrates multi-vendor package consolidation and international logistics through typed contracts and automated workflows.

title: PBXAI - Real-time Voice AI Orchestration Engine
description: Architected a low-latency Node.js system to bridge traditional VoIP telephony (Asterisk) with generative AI brains, enabling real-time, bidirectional voice interactions.

metadata.target: Enterprise Telecom and AI Voice Platforms

challenge: Traditional telephony systems and modern AI models operate on vastly different protocols. Bridging them requires maintaining sub-millisecond latency to prevent conversation lag and 'unnatural' pauses in voice interactions.
The system needed to handle complex SIP call states (ringing, answered, bridged, hung up) while simultaneously managing high-bandwidth audio streaming, silence detection, and jitter buffering.
Ensuring high availability was critical; any failure in the orchestration layer would lead to dropped calls or broken AI logic, requiring a robust recovery and circuit-breaker mechanism.

narrative: I engineered a custom media gateway using the Asterisk REST Interface (ARI) to capture raw audio streams and route them to AI 'Brains' via high-concurrency WebSockets. The architecture utilizes a state-machine pattern to manage call lifecycles predictably.

To ensure a natural conversation flow, I implemented an advanced media processing layer that includes a silence detector for intelligent turn-taking and a jitter buffer to handle network-induced audio artifacts.

features.title: Bidirectional Audio Routing
features.description: High-performance media router that handles full-duplex audio streaming between PSTN channels and WebSocket-based AI clients.

features.title: Intelligent Silence Detection
features.description: Real-time audio analysis engine that detects user speech end-points to trigger AI response generation with minimal latency.

features.title: Stateful Call Management
features.description: A robust state machine that tracks Asterisk channel events and ensures the AI context remains synchronized with the telephony state.

features.title: Resilient AI Clients
features.description: Integration layer featuring circuit breakers and error recovery handlers to maintain call stability during AI service interruptions.

implementation.description: The orchestrator is built on Fastify for its high throughput and low overhead. It leverages an ARI Gateway to interface with Asterisk, while a dedicated Media Manager handles the intricacies of audio chunking, buffering, and protocol transformation.

results.narrative: The implementation of the Node Orchestrator successfully transformed legacy telephony into a modern AI-ready platform. By optimizing the media path and implementing a rigorous state machine, the system now supports thousands of concurrent voice sessions with natural, low-latency AI interaction.

parentClass.name: Real-time Media Gateway
parentClass.description: A high-concurrency runtime that bridges protocol boundaries, manages bidirectional media streams, and maintains stateful channel lifecycles with built-in resilience patterns.

inheritedTraits.label: Bidirectional Streaming
inheritedTraits.evidence: Full-duplex audio routing between PSTN channels and WebSocket-based AI clients with real-time protocol transformation.

inheritedTraits.label: Stateful Channel Management
inheritedTraits.evidence: A state machine tracks Asterisk channel events — ringing, answered, bridged, hung up — keeping AI context synchronized with telephony state.

inheritedTraits.label: Circuit-Breaker Resilience
inheritedTraits.evidence: Integration layer with circuit breakers and error recovery handlers maintains call stability during AI service interruptions.

overrides.label: Silence Detection Turn-Taking
overrides.description: Real-time audio analysis that detects user speech endpoints to trigger AI response generation, enabling natural conversational flow with minimal latency.

overrides.label: Low-Latency AI Brain Bridging
overrides.description: Custom media processing pipeline with jitter buffering that routes raw audio to generative AI brains via high-concurrency WebSockets while maintaining sub-millisecond timing.

inheritanceStory.resultingIdentity: A specialized voice AI orchestrator that bridges legacy telephony with generative AI through real-time audio processing and intelligent turn-taking.
